Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=precorrin-5 + S-adenosyl-L-methionine + H2O = precorrin-6A + acetate + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + 2 H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:18261, ChEBI:CHEBI:15377, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:30089, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:77871, ChEBI:CHEBI:77872; EC=2.1.1.152;
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Catalyzes the methylation of C-1 in precorrin-5 and the subsequent extrusion of acetic acid from the resulting intermediate to form cobalt-precorrin-6A.
